pi_items.source: Thunderbird preferences mapping for 'Use the following sound file' (mail.biff.play_sound.type) and task description instructions.
Python data generation script in setup_task.sh which explicitly creates /home/ga/Documents/urgent_bell.wav.
Task description instruction to 'UNCHECK Subject' mapping to mail.biff.alert.show_subject preference.
Task description instruction to 'UNCHECK Message Text' mapping to mail.biff.alert.show_preview preference.
Task description instruction to change setting to 'After displaying for X seconds' mapping to mailnews.mark_message_read.delay preference.
Task description instruction to 'Set the delay interval to exactly 5 seconds' mapping to mailnews.mark_message_read.delay.interval preference.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for thunderbird_env configure_secure_reading_alerts task by confirming that the target audio file 'urgent_bell.wav' is synthetically generated via a python script in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected preferences for custom sound type (1), showing subject (false), showing preview (false), read delay (true), and read delay interval (5) perfectly match the explicit task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task completely unscorable.
